diagrams.title: Division Algorithm Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how dividend a is divided by divisor b to get quotient q and remainder r
diagrams.purpose: Understand the relationship a = bq + r with 0 ≤ r < b

diagrams.title: Euclidean Algorithm Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step geometric interpretation showing division of larger number by smaller
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how repeated division finds GCD

diagrams.title: Prime Factorization Tree
diagrams.description: Breaking down a composite number into prime factors
diagrams.purpose: Understand Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic visually

diagrams.title: GCD and LCM Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows prime factors of two numbers and intersection for GCD/union for LCM
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how GCD and LCM are formed from prime factors
